response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but falls well short of a Director-level Principal Engineer bar focused on AI strategy. Total professional experience is roughly 11 years (post-2014 staff-level work), short of the 15-year minimum, and there is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products/platforms, cloud-scale architecture leadership, or advising strategic customers at the level this role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded and microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, OSS founder, conference talks, workshops
concerns: Tenure (~11 years staff+) falls short of the 15-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of Director-level IC scope, strategy advisory, or cloud platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform track record
